summary: The user is exploring new tea recipes and has been making tea with fresh herbs from their indoor herb garden. They are interested in drying herbs to experiment with flavors and seek advice on proper herb drying, storage, and pruning techniques to maintain a healthy indoor garden.
facts: The user has an indoor herb garden from which they make tea almost every morning. The user is interested in trying the Citrus Sunrise and Mint to Be tea recipes. The user plans to experiment with drying herbs to see how it changes the flavor of their tea. The user has pots of herbs on their kitchen counter and wants to ensure they receive enough light and water. The user is looking for tips on how to properly dry herbs at home. The user is considering air drying their herbs using a method that involves tying them in small bunches and hanging them upside down in a warm, dry place. The user is interested in learning more about pruning and grooming their herbs to encourage bushy growth and prevent legginess.
